name: 9router-agent
description: Smart AI Agent proxy with multi-model fallback via 9router

scripts.postinstall: git submodule update --init --recursive 2>nul || echo Submodule init ignorado
scripts.build:sidecar: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),cp=require('child_process');const p='9router'+require('path').sep+'cli';if(!fs.existsSync(p)){console.log('submodule 9router nao encontrado');return}if(!process.env.SIDECAR_ENABLED){console.log('SIDECAR_ENABLED=false, pulando build sidecar');return}console.log('Buildando sidecar 9Router...');cp.execSync('npm install && npm run build',{cwd:'9router',stdio:'inherit'})"
